visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) In a brightly lit Costco retail store, a woman with long dark hair, wearing a brown off-the-shoulder top and a black skirt, stands in front of a large glass-door freezer filled with frozen food packages. She holds a large white and brown bag of Supreme Salmon Cauliflower Rice towards the camera. The background displays multiple rows of Shrimp Fitter boxes. Colorful text overlays appear in the foreground. (2) The scene transitions to an indoor dining setting. Two women sit at a gray table; the first woman is on the left holding an empty clear glass bowl and a yellow spatula, while a second woman wearing a gray bucket hat sits on the right eating from a smaller bowl with chopsticks. The background shows a living room with shelves, soft lighting, and home decor. (3) A close-up shot focuses on a mound of cooked cauliflower rice in a clear bowl. The food contains visible pieces of pink salmon, green edamame, and red quinoa grains. A metallic pepper grinder is seen moving over the bowl, seasoning the food with black pepper. (4) Back to the two women at the dining table. They are actively eating and talking enthusiastically. The woman on the right takes a bite and gestures with her chopsticks, looking satisfied. Dynamic text overlays with orange and yellow highlights appear at the bottom of the frame.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 減肥必吃！ [Subtitle]: 香蒜鮭魚花椰米. [Subtitle]: 美威 Supreme Salmon. (2) [Subtitle]: 429元 哦聽說. [Variety]: !!!. (3) [Subtitle]: 減肥的人都會吃這個. [Subtitle]: 那就是由各種健康的. (4) [Subtitle]: 東西組成在一起. [Subtitle]: 然後它裡面呢. (5) [Subtitle]: 270公克一袋. [Subtitle]: 裡面總共有四袋. (6) [Subtitle]: 所以平均一袋100多. [Subtitle]: 100初 然後你就不用吃米飯. (7) [Subtitle]: 改吃這些有花椰菜啊. [Subtitle]: 一些青菜組成的米. (8) [Variety]: 增加飽足感. [Subtitle]: 增加飽足感 又可以變瘦. (9) [Subtitle]: 還可以直接微波或拌炒. [Subtitle]: 來試試看厲不厲害. (10) [Subtitle]: 要好吃才行 不然的話. [Subtitle]: 我寧願胖. (11) [Subtitle]: 好吃到剛上桌. [Variety]: 直接被空碗. (12) [Subtitle]: 美味鮭魚炒飯. [Subtitle]: 這個有在 CARE. (13) [Subtitle]: 它不是炒飯 它是花椰菜米. [Variety]: 太像炒飯了. (14) [Subtitle]: 可是吃起來真的 太像炒飯了. [Subtitle]: 煮的方式也非常方便. (15) [Subtitle]: 你直接微波 或放在鍋子裡炒都可以. [Subtitle]: 我們是直接微波. (16) [Variety]: 比較濕的 鮭魚炒飯. [Subtitle]: 超好吃加一點胡椒鹽就是. (17) [Subtitle]: 比較濕的鮭魚炒飯 可是很好吃. [Subtitle]: 它裡面有毛豆 藜麥 紅蘿蔔. (18) [Subtitle]: 就是平常你看到會很「嘖」的東西. [Subtitle]: 可是拌在裡面喔 很好吃. (19) [Subtitle]: 真滿滿的鮭魚. [Subtitle]: 這個呢如果你有在就是健身. (20) [Variety]: 飲食結構. [Subtitle]: 或者是有在減脂 或者是你想要改變你的. [Subtitle]: 飲食結構 讓你吃的更健康的話. (21) [Subtitle]: 這個 可以. [Subtitle]: 然後或者是你很忙很忙. (22) [Subtitle]: 這絕對是最健康最方便的. [Subtitle]: 不用解凍 三分鐘就可以吃.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 primary female narrator and 1 female companion at the dining table.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Main character has long black hair, wearing a brown off-the-shoulder shirt and a black skirt. The companion wears a gray bucket hat and a dark purple dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first location is a Costco warehouse freezer aisle with rows of frozen food packaging. The second is a domestic living room/dining area with a dining table, storage shelves, and decorative items.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins speaking with a bright, friendly, and energetic tone, presenting information at a fast speech rate. Upbeat electronic pop background music with a steady rhythmic pulse and synthesizer layers plays continuously. The acoustic environment is clean with a slight indoor resonance. (2) A sharp 'pop' sound effect occurs as a transitional element while the speaker details pricing. The background music maintains its upbeat tempo. A second female voice joins in, laughing and agreeing, showing high emotional arousal and positive valence. (3) Sounds of chopsticks clinking against ceramic bowls and light rustling are heard as the scene shifts. The speakers' voices overlap in a casual, excited conversational style. A mechanical grinding sound (pepper seasoning) provides a brief acoustic interruption. (4) The vocal delivery reaches a peak of excitement as the speakers describe the taste, accompanied by a subtle 'ding' sound effect for emphasis. The background music continues as a stable rhythmic bed through to the end of the clip, providing a consistent energy floor.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Intro -> Value Proposition -> Real-world Trial -> Health Benefit Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To recommend a specific healthy frozen food product (cauliflower rice) from Costco by emphasizing its low-calorie benefits for weight loss, ease of preparation, and surprisingly good taste that mimics traditional fried rice.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video directly features the brand names, discusses price points, and highlights product benefits in a typical influencer review style.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly engaging short-form social media review utilizing fast-paced editing and bright visual overlays to appeal to health-conscious consumers.
